**Before filing:** please skim the
[Troubleshooting wiki](https://github.com/louissilvestri/MS2K_Interface/wiki/Troubleshooting) —
common issues (synth SysEx filter, Reaper SysEx‑receive limitation, patch names) are covered
there.

## What happened
A clear description of the bug and what you expected instead.

## Which build
- [ ] Standalone app
- [ ] VST3 plugin

## Steps to reproduce
1.
2.
3.

## Setup
- **App/plugin version:** (see the installer filename or Releases tag, e.g. v1.0.0)
- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11)
- **DAW (if plugin):** (e.g. Reaper 7.x)
- **Synth:** MS2000 / MS2000R
- **MIDI interface:** (e.g. UM‑ONE) · **MIDI channel:**

## Logs / files
- VST3: attach `%APPDATA%\MS2K_Interface\ms2k_vst.log` if the problem involves MIDI/patch transfer.
- A `.syx` file or screenshot, if relevant.

## Anything else
Additional context.
